intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC重塑专利格局，FRAND与合规成焦点
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Reshapes Patent Landscape; FRAND & Compliance in Focus
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP战场呈现司法权威强化与合规门槛提升的双重态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过多起关键判决确立管辖权优先性并严格审查专利有效性，显著改变诉讼策略。同时，修订版TTBER生效及CJEU关于版权费率的裁决，进一步收紧了FRAND许可与反垄断合规要求。商标领域对恶意注册及虚假历史叙事的打击力度加大，结合英国官费上调，企业需全面优化IP组合管理与风险防控体系。
top_signals: UPC在多起案件中展现强执行力，包括撤销高价值专利及确立FRAND反诉管辖权优先原则
修订版TTBER正式实施，为专利池、数据许可及集体谈判提供明确反垄断安全港指引
CJEU裁定忽视实际使用情况的固定版权费率可能构成滥用市场支配地位
德国及欧盟层面加强对商标恶意注册及虚构品牌历史的监管与无效宣告风险
cross_currents: 司法确定性增强：UPC的活跃裁判与EPO审查实践趋同共同提升了欧洲专利权利边界的可预测性
许可模式重构：从单纯的技术授权转向包含FRAND合规、反垄断评估及数据权益的综合商业谈判
品牌叙事合规化：传统营销手段如虚构历史年份面临更高的法律欺诈认定风险，需实证支撑
implications: 中企需重新评估现有SEP许可协议以符合新TTBER反垄断要求，并利用交叉许可降低诉讼成本
在欧运营企业应建立严格的商标监控机制，防范恶意抢注，并确保品牌宣传素材符合GDPR及非歧视原则
针对UPC诉讼，需提前准备单一产品层面的完整技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂侵权指控
watchlist: 摩尔多瓦加入EPO后对中国企业一站式专利申请流程的具体影响及生效节点
UPC后续关于FRAND费率计算方法的判例积累及其对全球许可基准的潜在引导作用
英国知识产权局数字外观设计审查指南实施后的实务反馈及官费上涨对维护预算的影响

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC严审禁令举证，欧盟新规重塑SEP与商标合规
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Tightens Injunction Proof; EU Reshapes SEP & TM Compliance
daily_report.executive_line: 本周UPC确立严格侵权举证标准，欧盟修订TTBER及版权判例强化反垄断监管，同时德国警示恶意抢注风险，企业需加速合规调整以应对执法趋严。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲IP环境呈现“司法严谨化”与“合规精细化”双重趋势。UPC杜塞尔多夫分院提高临时禁令门槛，要求单一产品特征比对；欧盟新TTBER生效，明确专利池与FRAND竞争法边界；CJEU裁定固定版权费率可能滥用支配地位。此外，德国DPMA警示AI驱动的恶意商标抢注激增，植物基食品命名禁令落地。华硕加入Sisvel专利池和解诉讼，显示头部厂商倾向许可而非对抗。企业需立即审查证据链、许可协议及品牌标识，规避法律与商业风险。

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Dismisses Preliminary Injunction: Strict Single-Product Infringement Proof Required
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed an applicant’s request for preliminary injunctions on May 12, 2026. The Court emphasized that applicants must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not. Regarding clear aligner patents, the ruling established that all technical features of a method claim must be embodied within a single product. Consequently, different treatment phases executed by separate aligners cannot be combined to establish infringement. Since the applicant relied exclusively on promotional materials without providing specific technical...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
All method claim features must be realized within a single aligner; features across different treatment stages cannot be aggregated.
Promotional materials and speculative witness statements are insufficient to prove infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC’s strict interpretation of 'single product' requirements for multi-stage medical treatments like clear aligner therapy. Parties seeking or defending against preliminary injunctions must prepare detailed, feature-by-feature technical comparisons rather than relying on marketing collateral. For companies operating in Europe, this highlights the necessity of conducting thorough Freedom-...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to single-product infringement definitions is critical for multi-stage medical device strategies.
Practice note: Develop comprehensive technical evidence chains avoiding reliance on general marketing materials for legal defense.
What to monitor: UPC case law regarding the aggregation of features across distinct treatment phases in method claims.

report_items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定驳回上诉：程序合规与费用担保标准
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Adobe Appeal: Strict Procedural Compliance and Cost Security Standards
report_items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 30, 2026, Order Rejecting Appeal As Inadmissible, UPC_CoA_1/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Adobe诉Keeex案中，裁定驳回上诉并确认程序规则需严格适用以保障法律确定性。法院依职权审查上诉期限，认定驳回裁定未超出请求范围。此外，法院重申原告与被告的相对财务状况不构成Rule 158下的费用担保考量因素。该判决强化了UPC程序规则的刚性，强调避免司法任意性，对后续涉及费用担保及程序合规的案件具有先例约束力。
report_items.summary_en: In the case of Adobe Inc. v. Keeex SAS, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal dismissed the appeal, reinforcing the strict application of procedural rules to ensure legal certainty. The Court conducted an ex officio review of appeal deadlines, confirming that a rejection order for inadmissibility does not exceed the scope of the claims. Furthermore, the judgment reaffirmed established case law stating that the relative financial disparity between claimant and defendant is not a valid criterion under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure for determining cost security. This decision unders...
core_points_zh: 法院依职权严格审查上诉期限与程序规则，确保法律确定性及非歧视原则
驳回上诉作为不可受理裁定，不视为超出当事人诉讼请求的范围
当事人相对财务状况不构成申请费用担保的法定依据，维持既往判例立场
core_points_en: The Court strictly reviews appeal deadlines and procedural rules ex officio to uphold legal certainty and prevent discriminatory or arbitrary judicial administration.
An order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible is legally distinct and does not constitute a decision exceeding the scope of the parties' specific claims.
Relative financial differences between parties do not serve as a statutory basis for cost security adjustments under Rule 158, maintaining consistent prior precedent.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，须严守程序期限，避免因技术性违规导致权利丧失。针对费用担保，不能仅凭双方财力差距抗辩，需准备实质性的胜诉可能性证据。建议加强内部IP合规流程，特别是跨境诉讼中的程序管理，以降低因程序失误带来的高额成本风险。
report_items.insight_en: Litigants before the UPC must prioritize rigorous adherence to procedural timelines and formal requirements, as technical non-compliance can lead to immediate dismissal regardless of substantive merits. Regarding cost security, arguments based solely on financial disparity are unlikely to succeed; instead, parties should focus on demonstrating a strong prima facie case regarding the likelihood of success on the merit...
insight_points_zh: 严守UPC程序期限，规避因技术性违规导致的权利丧失风险
费用担保抗辩需侧重胜诉可能性，而非单纯依赖财力对比

Practice note: Substantiate cost security defenses with evidence of merit rather than relying on comparative financial strength.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 158 and ex officio admissibility checks in UPC cost security proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟达成禁令：植物基替代品禁用肉类名称
report_items.title_en: EU Agreement Bans Specific Meat Names for Plant-Based Alternatives to Prevent Consumer Misleading
report_items.title: Ban on the use of meat names for plant-based alternatives
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟机构达成协议，禁止在植物基替代产品上使用特定肉类名称（如鸡肉、牛肉），旨在防止消费者被误导并依据《欧盟商标条例》第7条避免注册误导性商标。通用词汇如“汉堡”仍可使用。该禁令可能导致含肉类名称的植物基品牌无法继续使用现有注册商标，迫使供应商修改包装及品牌策略以符合新规。
report_items.summary_en: The European Parliament, Council, and member states have agreed to prohibit the use of specific meat names on plant-based alternatives. This measure aims to prevent consumer confusion and ensure clarity regarding product nature, aligning with Article 7 of the EU Trademark Regulation (EUTMR), which bars registration of marks likely to mislead the public about quality or origin. While generic terms like 'burger' or 'sausage' remain permissible for describing vegetarian products, specific references to animal parts such as chicken, beef, or bacon are now reserved exclusively for actual meat. Cons...
core_points_zh: 欧盟禁止植物基产品使用特定动物部位名称，以防误导公众
依据EUTMR第7条，误导性商标不得注册，现有品牌可能受限
通用描述词如burger允许使用，但需移除具体肉类指代词汇
core_points_en: Specific animal part names like chicken or beef are banned on plant-based products to prevent misleading consumers about the true nature of the goods.
Article 7 of the EUTMR prohibits registering trademarks that mislead the public, potentially invalidating existing brands using restricted meat terminology.
Generic descriptive terms such as burger remain allowed, but specific meat references must be removed from packaging and marketing materials immediately.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧出口植物基食品的中国企业而言，需立即审查现有商标及包装，移除鸡、牛等具体肉类词汇以避免侵权或违规。建议保留burger等通用词，重新设计品牌标识。同时评估现有注册商标的有效性，必要时进行变更或新申请，确保符合欧盟反误导规定，降低法律风险。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants offering plant-based alternatives in the EU must urgently audit their current trademark portfolios and product packaging. Brands utilizing specific meat-related terms risk non-compliance with the new ban, potentially rendering protected marks unusable for their intended goods. Companies should transition to generic descriptors like 'veggie burger' while evaluating the validity of existing registra...
insight_points_zh: 立即审查在欧植物基产品包装，移除具体肉类名称以合规
评估现有含肉类词商标风险，及时调整品牌策略应对禁令
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Urgent review of EU plant-based product packaging is required to remove specific meat names and ensure regulatory compliance.
Practice note: Assess the viability of existing trademarks containing meat terms and adjust brand strategies to avoid infringement or invalidation.
What to monitor: Ongoing enforcement actions by EU authorities regarding the use of prohibited animal-specific terminology in food marketing.

report_items.title_zh: 法律保留与文件保全：如何掌握诉讼主动权
report_items.title_en: Legal Holds and Document Preservation: Securing Early Procedural Advantage
report_items.title: Legal holds and document preservation: How to get on the front foot
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出，在争议早期识别并保存文件证据不仅是最佳实践，更是强制性程序要求。依据《民事诉讼规则》及PD57AD，当当事人知晓可能成为诉讼方时，必须立即采取具体步骤识别并保存相关文件。这包括实施“停止时钟”的数据保留措施。及时且妥善的法律保留能确保在后续收集和审查阶段前完成初步工作，从而在诉讼中占据有利地位，避免因证据灭失而面临不利后果。
report_items.summary_en: Identifying and preserving documentary evidence at the early stages of a dispute is not merely best practice but a mandatory procedural requirement under English law. Although there is no formal definition of a 'legal hold', parties face strict obligations to take specific, timely steps to identify and preserve documents related to actual or potential litigation. This duty arises under the Civil Procedure Rules and Practice Direction 57AD when a party knows it may become involved in proceedings. Immediate 'stop the clock' measures on data are required to prevent automatic deletion or overwriti...
core_points_zh: 法律保留是强制性程序义务，非仅最佳实践，需严格遵守
触发点为知晓可能成为诉讼当事人，须立即启动文件识别与保存
需执行“停止时钟”数据保留，确保早期保全以利于后续举证
core_points_en: Legal holds constitute a mandatory procedural obligation requiring strict compliance rather than serving as optional best practices.
The preservation trigger occurs upon knowledge of potential litigation, necessitating immediate identification and safeguarding of relevant documents.
Implementing 'stop the clock' data retention measures ensures early preservation facilitates effective later evidence collection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对欧洲IP纠纷时，应建立即时响应机制。一旦收到律师函或知悉潜在诉讼，须立即冻结相关电子数据与文档，防止自动覆盖。忽视此程序义务可能导致证据被排除或面临制裁。建议提前制定合规预案，确保在UPC或英国法院诉讼中有效履行披露义务，维护自身合法权益。
report_items.insight_en: Parties facing potential IP disputes in the UK must establish robust internal protocols for immediate document preservation upon receiving notice of potential claims. Failure to implement timely legal holds can result in severe procedural sanctions, including the exclusion of critical evidence. Organizations should integrate these preservation duties into their broader compliance frameworks to ensure readiness for di...
insight_points_zh: 建立即时响应机制，知悉潜在诉讼即冻结相关电子数据
重视程序合规，避免因未履行证据保全义务导致证据失效
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish immediate response mechanisms to freeze electronic data upon awareness of potential litigation risks.
Practice note: Prioritize procedural compliance in evidence preservation to prevent invalidation of key documents due to failure to act.
What to monitor: Ensure alignment with evolving disclosure standards under Practice Direction 57AD and Civil Procedure Rules.

report_items.title_zh: 华硕加入Sisvel Wi-Fi专利池并结束诉讼
report_items.title_en: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
report_items.title: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
report_items.summary_zh: 华硕已就Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池中的标准必要专利（SEP）达成许可协议，此举结束了其与华为、飞利浦及Wilus之间的未决专利诉讼。该专利池覆盖Wi-Fi 6和Wi-Fi 7标准。华硕加入后，成为继惠普企业、华为、松下、飞利浦、索尼集团和中兴通讯之后的又一主要被许可人。Sisvel未披露具体财务条款，但此交易标志着其在消费电子领域SEP许可策略的进一步扩展。
core_points_zh: 华硕获Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池许可，涵盖Wi-Fi 6/7标准必要专利
许可协议终结华硕与华为、飞利浦及Wilus间的未决专利侵权诉讼
华硕加入现有许可人名单，反映Sisvel在Wi-Fi SEP领域的市场影响力
report_items.insight_zh: 华硕和解表明头部厂商倾向于通过许可解决SEP纠纷以规避市场风险。对在欧中国企业而言，面对Sisvel等聚合平台的许可谈判，应尽早评估FRAND合规性，避免陷入长期诉讼导致产品禁售或声誉受损。建议积极利用交叉许可或加入专利池等方式降低合规成本。
insight_points_zh: 头部厂商倾向许可和解，警示SEP诉讼的高昂市场风险
建议中企提前评估FRAND合规，利用交叉许可以降低成本

report_items.title_zh: Taylor Wessing聘请Eisenführ Speiser合伙人强化德国专利业务
report_items.title_en: Taylor Wessing Strengthens German Patent Practice with Key Hires from Eisenführ Speiser
report_items.title: Taylor Wessing bolsters German patent practice with Eisenführ Speiser hires
report_items.summary_zh: 国际律所Taylor Wessing宣布将于6月1日吸纳两名来自Eisenführ Speiser的新合伙人，以重建其德国专利实践团队。此举旨在弥补去年秋季大规模团队分拆后的实力损失，恢复该所在德国专利领域的传统优势。新加入的合伙人Michael Schneider拥有逾20年专利诉讼经验，尤其在移动通信领域具备深厚专长。这一人事变动凸显了律所在竞争激烈的德国市场中巩固其知识产权服务地位的战略意图。
report_items.summary_en: International law firm Taylor Wessing has announced the recruitment of two new partners from Eisenführ Speiser, effective June 1. This strategic move aims to rebuild its German patent practice team following the significant departure of a large group last autumn. The hires are intended to restore the firm’s former strength and traditional advantages in the German patent sector. Among the new additions is Michael Schneider, who brings over twenty years of experience in patent litigation, with specialized expertise in mobile communications technologies. This personnel change highlights Taylor We...
core_points_zh: Taylor Wessing于6月1日引入两名新合伙人以强化德国专利团队
此举旨在修复去年团队分拆影响，恢复其在德国市场的领先地位
新合伙人Michael Schneider深耕移动通信领域二十余年专利诉讼
core_points_en: Taylor Wessing recruits two new partners on June 1 to significantly strengthen its German patent litigation team capabilities.
The hiring strategy addresses previous team departures, aiming to restore the firm's leading market position in Germany.
New partner Michael Schneider offers over twenty years of specialized patent litigation experience in mobile communications.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国通信企业应关注德国专利诉讼团队变动，特别是具有移动通信背景的资深律师动向。这预示着德国专利诉讼活跃度可能提升，建议提前评估潜在风险，优化在德国市场的IP布局与应诉策略，必要时建立与该类强势律所的合作或预警机制。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants should monitor personnel shifts within top-tier German patent firms, particularly those involving senior litigators with deep telecommunications backgrounds. Such moves often signal increased activity and competitiveness in high-stakes patent litigation sectors. Companies operating in Europe should proactively assess potential litigation risks associated with these evolving legal landscapes. It is...
insight_points_zh: 关注德所人员变动，预判移动通信领域专利诉讼活跃度上升
提前优化在欧IP布局，建立针对资深诉讼专家的应对与合作机制
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor staffing changes at leading German firms to anticipate heightened litigation activity in mobile communications.
Practice note: Proactively refine European IP strategies and defense mechanisms to address potential risks from experienced litigators.
What to monitor: Track the integration of senior specialists into major practices to identify emerging legal threats and partnership opportunities.

report_items.title_zh: 修订版TTBER下技术许可：专利池、FRAND及集体谈判指南更清晰
report_items.title_en: Revised EU TTBER: Enhanced Guidance on Patent Pools, FRAND, and Collective Negotiations
report_items.title: Technology licensing under the revised TTBER: clearer guidance for pools, FRAND and collective negotiations
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会于2026年4月16日通过修订版《技术转移集体豁免条例》(TTBER)及配套指南，将于5月1日生效。新规保留原有安全港结构，但细化了针对专利池、标准必要技术(SEP)许可及集体谈判的合规指导。对于涉及复杂许可模式的企业，需重点评估协议结构以降低反垄断风险，确保符合TFEU第101(3)条要求。
report_items.summary_en: On 16 April 2026, the European Commission adopted the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) and accompanying Guidelines, effective 1 May 2026. This new framework replaces the 2014 rules, maintaining the established safe harbour structure under Article 101(3) TFEU for agreements meeting market share thresholds and avoiding hardcore restrictions. Significantly, the revised Guidelines provide detailed competition law guidance for modern licensing structures, including technology pools, standard-essential technology (SEP) licensing, data licensing, and licensing negotiatio...
core_points_zh: 修订版TTBER及指南于2026年5月1日生效，取代2014年框架
新增对专利池、数据许可及标准必要技术许可的详细竞争法指导
企业需优化复杂许可协议结构以规避反垄断风险并享受安全港保护
core_points_en: The revised TTBER and Guidelines enter into force on 1 May 2026, replacing the previous 2014 regulatory framework.
New provisions offer specific competition law guidance for patent pools, data licensing, and standard-essential technology arrangements.
Companies must optimize complex licensing agreement structures to ensure antitrust compliance and qualify for safe harbour protection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国科技企业应密切关注新规对SEP许可及专利池的合规要求，特别是在参与集体谈判时。建议重新审查现有许可协议，确保不包含核心限制条款，并利用新指南优化FRAND谈判策略，以降低在欧面临的反垄断调查与诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: Stakeholders involved in technology licensing should closely monitor the updated compliance requirements for SEP licensing and patent pool participation, particularly regarding collective negotiation mechanisms. It is advisable to review existing licensing agreements to ensure they do not contain hardcore restrictions that could jeopardize block exemption status. Furthermore, parties should utilize the new Guidelines...
insight_points_zh: 重新审查SEP许可协议以符合新规反垄断合规要求
利用新指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判策略
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review SEP licensing agreements to align with new antitrust compliance requirements under the revised TTBER.
Practice note: Leverage updated guidelines to optimize participation in patent pools and structure collective negotiation strategies effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving enforcement priorities regarding hardcore restrictions and compliance in complex technology transfer arrangements.

report_items.title_zh: CJEU：忽视入住率的版权费率过高或构成滥用市场支配地位
report_items.title_en: Copyright royalty rates excessive of economic value may be abusive of dominant position, rules CJEU against Czech CMO
report_items.title: Copyright royalty rates excessive of economic value may be abusive of dominant position, rules CJEU against Czech CMO
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟法院裁定捷克集体管理组织OSA向酒店收取固定版权费未考虑房间入住率，可能违反TFEU第102条构成滥用支配地位。法院强调版权许可费应与被许可人实际获得的经济价值成比例，若行政上可行，忽略入住率等实际使用情况的定价属不公平高价。该裁决要求版权收费机制必须反映真实经济价值，对欧盟内版权许可实践具有深远影响。
core_points_zh: CJEU裁定忽略入住率的固定版权费率可能构成滥用市场支配地位
版权许可费必须与被许可人实际获得的经济价值及作品使用情况成比例
若行政可行，集体管理组织需采用基于实际使用（如入住率）的计费方法
report_items.insight_zh: 在欧运营酒店、餐饮及娱乐设施的中国企业应重新审查现有版权许可协议。若支付固定费用且未挂钩实际使用情况，可依据此判例主张费率不公并寻求调整。建议评估历史缴费记录，必要时通过谈判或法律途径争取更公平的计费方式，以降低合规成本并规避反垄断风险。
insight_points_zh: 在欧中企应审查版权许可费是否与实际使用情况挂钩以规避反垄断风险
可依据CJEU判例主张固定费率不公，通过谈判或诉讼争取合理计费方式

weekly_report.headline_zh: EPO新规扩展现有技术，UPC强化程序合规
weekly_report.headline_en: EPO expands prior art; UPC tightens procedure
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周EPO推翻“可再现性”先例极大扩展现有技术范围，UPC确立严格举证与程序标准，欧盟反垄断指南生效，企业需紧急调整专利布局与许可策略以规避高风险。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP战局呈现制度收紧与合规高压态势。EPO扩大上诉委员会裁定市场公开产品即属现有技术，无论是否可反向工程，彻底改变新颖性审查逻辑。UPC在临时禁令举证及上诉程序上确立严苛标准，同时PMAC调解中心正式运营提供新解纷路径。此外，修订版TTBER生效明确SEP许可竞争法边界，CJEU裁定版权固定费率可能构成滥用支配地位。植物基食品命名禁令亦带来商标合规新挑战。

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Dismisses Preliminary Injunction: Strict Single-Product Infringement Proof Required
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed an applicant’s request for preliminary injunctions on May 12, 2026. The Court emphasized that applicants must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not. Regarding clear aligner patents, the ruling established that all technical features of a method claim must be embodied within a single product. Consequently, different treatment phases executed by separate aligners cannot be combined to establish infringement. Since the applicant relied exclusively on promotional materials without providing specific technical...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
All method claim features must be realized within a single aligner; features across different treatment stages cannot be aggregated.
Promotional materials and speculative witness statements are insufficient to prove infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC’s strict interpretation of 'single product' requirements for multi-stage medical treatments like clear aligner therapy. Parties seeking or defending against preliminary injunctions must prepare detailed, feature-by-feature technical comparisons rather than relying on marketing collateral. For companies operating in Europe, this highlights the necessity of conducting thorough Freedom-...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to single-product infringement definitions is critical for multi-stage medical device strategies.
Practice note: Develop comprehensive technical evidence chains avoiding reliance on general marketing materials for legal defense.
What to monitor: UPC case law regarding the aggregation of features across distinct treatment phases in method claims.

report_items.title_zh: 如何在欧洲专利局提起专利异议
report_items.title_en: How to file an opposition at the European Patent Office (EPO) | Potter Clarkson
report_items.title: How to file an opposition at the European Patent Office (EPO) | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 本文详解在欧洲专利局（EPO）对已授权专利提起异议的程序。异议是第三方挑战专利有效性的核心途径，须在法定期限内提交书面或电子申请并缴费。异议理由严格限于《欧洲专利公约》第100条规定的缺乏可专利性、公开不充分或超范围等特定法律依据。文章强调需通过官方渠道如在线 filing 2.0 提交，且费用支付需即时完成，为从业者提供实操指引。
core_points_zh: 异议是挑战已授权欧洲专利的核心行政程序
必须基于EPC第100条特定法律理由如缺乏创造性
需通过指定渠道提交并同步缴纳官方异议费
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧获权后应建立监控机制，防范竞争对手利用异议程序拖延或无效专利。若作为异议方，需精准锁定EPC第100条 grounds，避免理由泛化被驳回。建议熟悉EPO电子提交流程，确保程序合规，以低成本高效解决专利争议，维护市场自由实施空间。
insight_points_zh: 建立专利监控机制防范对手发起异议挑战
精准锁定EPC第100条理由确保异议程序合规

report_items.title_zh: 保持信誉：文字商标用于Logo仍视为真实使用
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Confirms Registered Word Marks Used in Logos Constitute Genuine Use
report_items.title: Keeping your word
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析英国知识产权局（UKIPO）近期三起案件（O/0080/26等），探讨将注册文字商标作为图形标识一部分使用的法律效力。文章指出，只要文字元素在整体标识中保持主导地位，这种使用方式并不妨碍被认定为“真实使用”。该裁决澄清了商标使用形式的合规性标准，为权利人在品牌视觉升级中保留法律保护提供了依据，强调了维持商标显著特征的重要性。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis examines three recent UK Intellectual Property Office decisions involving Kilburn & Strode LLP against various respondents. The central issue concerns whether incorporating a registered word mark into a composite logo design satisfies the legal requirement for genuine use. The rulings clarify that such usage does not preclude a finding of genuine use, provided the word elements remain the dominant component of the overall visual presentation. This interpretation reinforces the principle that minor aesthetic modifications or integration into broader branding do not invalidate righ...
core_points_zh: 文字商标融入图形Logo若保持主导元素，可认定构成真实使用
UKIPO在多起案件中确认非纯粹文字形式的使用符合维持注册要求
权利人需确保修改后的标识未改变原注册商标的显著特征
core_points_en: Integrating a registered word mark into a logo constitutes genuine use if the words remain the dominant element.
The UK IPO confirmed in multiple cases that non-purely textual use meets registration maintenance requirements.
Rights holders must ensure modified identifiers do not alter the distinctive character of the original registered mark.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在英欧市场进行品牌视觉升级时，常将文字与图形结合。需注意保留文字的主导地位，避免因过度设计导致被视为新标识而丧失原有保护。建议定期审查商标使用证据，确保符合“真实使用”标准，以防因连续五年不使用而被撤销注册，保障品牌资产安全。
report_items.insight_en: Brands frequently update visual identities by combining text with graphic elements. To maintain valid protection, it is essential that the registered word mark retains its dominant position within the new composite design. Over-designing or obscuring the text may result in the usage being treated as a new, unregistered sign, risking loss of existing rights. Regular audits of trademark use evidence are necessary to de...
insight_points_zh: 品牌视觉升级应保留文字主导地位以维持注册有效性
定期审查使用证据以防因未真实使用导致商标被撤销
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Preserve word dominance during visual upgrades to maintain registration validity and avoid rights erosion.
Practice note: Conduct regular reviews of use evidence to ensure compliance with genuine use standards and prevent revocation.
What to monitor: Monitor UK IPO decisions regarding composite marks to adapt branding strategies without compromising distinctiveness.

report_items.title_zh: 名人之名非版权保护对象：奥威尔遗产诉EUIPO案评析
report_items.title_en: Copyright Protects Works, Not Names: EUIPO Rejects Orwell Estate Trademark Claim
report_items.title: The distinguishing mark of man
report_items.summary_zh: 本文评析了EUIPO上诉委员会在R 2248/2019-G案中的决定，涉及已故作家乔治·奥威尔的遗产管理人Sonia Brownell Orwell。文章指出，尽管作者享有盛誉，但版权法的宗旨在于保护其创作的作品，而非其姓名或名声。该案件凸显了在欧盟商标注册中，试图通过版权主张来垄断知名人物姓名的法律局限性，强调了知识产权不同领域间的界限。
report_items.summary_en: This commentary analyzes the EUIPO Board of Appeal decision in case R 2248/2019-G, involving the Estate of the late Sonia Brownell Orwell. The article clarifies that copyright law is designed to protect creative works, not an author's name or public reputation, regardless of their fame. The case highlights the legal limitations of attempting to monopolize a famous person's name through copyright claims in EU trademark registration. It underscores the distinct boundaries between different intellectual property rights, demonstrating that copyright cannot serve as a basis for securing exclusive t...
core_points_zh: 版权法旨在保护作品表达，不延伸至保护作者的姓名或公众声誉
EUIPO驳回奥威尔遗产方基于版权主张注册其姓名的尝试
知名人物姓名不能仅凭版权理由获得排他性商标保护
core_points_en: Copyright law protects the expression of works and does not extend to protecting an author's name or public reputation.
The EUIPO rejected the Orwell Estate's attempt to register the author's name based on copyright grounds.
Famous names cannot obtain exclusive trademark protection solely by relying on copyright arguments.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局品牌时，应明确版权与商标权的边界。切勿试图利用版权法垄断通用名称或名人姓名以获取商标独占权，此举在欧盟缺乏法律依据。建议企业建立清晰的IP组合策略，分别通过商标和版权保护不同的资产要素，避免因权利基础混淆导致注册失败或无效风险。
report_items.insight_en: Practitioners must clearly distinguish between the subject matter protected by copyright and trademarks to avoid confusion regarding rights bases. In the EU, attempting to use copyright law to monopolize generic terms or celebrity names for trademark exclusivity lacks legal foundation. Companies should establish clear IP portfolio strategies, protecting different asset elements through appropriate rights. This approa...
insight_points_zh: 厘清版权与商标保护客体差异，避免权利基础混淆
在欧注册含名人元素商标需评估版权主张的法律可行性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Distinguish copyright and trademark protection objects to prevent confusion over rights bases.
Practice note: Assess the legal feasibility of copyright claims when registering trademarks with celebrity elements in the EU.
What to monitor: EUIPO decisions regarding the intersection of copyright claims and trademark registration for famous names.

report_items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定驳回上诉：程序合规与费用担保标准
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Adobe Appeal: Strict Procedural Compliance and Cost Security Standards
report_items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 30, 2026, Order Rejecting Appeal As Inadmissible, UPC_CoA_1/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Adobe诉Keeex案中，裁定驳回上诉并确认程序规则需严格适用以保障法律确定性。法院依职权审查上诉期限，认定驳回裁定未超出请求范围。此外，法院重申原告与被告的相对财务状况不构成Rule 158下的费用担保考量因素。该判决强化了UPC程序规则的刚性，强调避免司法任意性，对后续涉及费用担保及程序合规的案件具有先例约束力。
report_items.summary_en: In the case of Adobe Inc. v. Keeex SAS, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal dismissed the appeal, reinforcing the strict application of procedural rules to ensure legal certainty. The Court conducted an ex officio review of appeal deadlines, confirming that a rejection order for inadmissibility does not exceed the scope of the claims. Furthermore, the judgment reaffirmed established case law stating that the relative financial disparity between claimant and defendant is not a valid criterion under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure for determining cost security. This decision unders...
core_points_zh: 法院依职权严格审查上诉期限与程序规则，确保法律确定性及非歧视原则
驳回上诉作为不可受理裁定，不视为超出当事人诉讼请求的范围
当事人相对财务状况不构成申请费用担保的法定依据，维持既往判例立场
core_points_en: The Court strictly reviews appeal deadlines and procedural rules ex officio to uphold legal certainty and prevent discriminatory or arbitrary judicial administration.
An order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible is legally distinct and does not constitute a decision exceeding the scope of the parties' specific claims.
Relative financial differences between parties do not serve as a statutory basis for cost security adjustments under Rule 158, maintaining consistent prior precedent.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，须严守程序期限，避免因技术性违规导致权利丧失。针对费用担保，不能仅凭双方财力差距抗辩，需准备实质性的胜诉可能性证据。建议加强内部IP合规流程，特别是跨境诉讼中的程序管理，以降低因程序失误带来的高额成本风险。
report_items.insight_en: Litigants before the UPC must prioritize rigorous adherence to procedural timelines and formal requirements, as technical non-compliance can lead to immediate dismissal regardless of substantive merits. Regarding cost security, arguments based solely on financial disparity are unlikely to succeed; instead, parties should focus on demonstrating a strong prima facie case regarding the likelihood of success on the merit...
insight_points_zh: 严守UPC程序期限，规避因技术性违规导致的权利丧失风险
费用担保抗辩需侧重胜诉可能性，而非单纯依赖财力对比
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure strict adherence to UPC procedural deadlines to avoid rights forfeiture due to technical violations.
Practice note: Substantiate cost security defenses with evidence of merit rather than relying on comparative financial strength.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 158 and ex officio admissibility checks in UPC cost security proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: EPO扩大上诉委员会：公开产品即便不可再现亦属现有技术
report_items.title_en: EPO Enlarged Board: Publicly Available Products Are Prior Art Even If Irreproducible
report_items.title: EPO Enlarged Board Clarifies: Publicly Available Products Are Prior Art, Even If Irreproducible
report_items.summary_zh: 2025年7月2日，EPO扩大上诉委员会在G1/23案中裁定，申请日前公开的产品构成现有技术，无论其成分是否可被分析或再现。该决定推翻了G1/92案确立的“可再现性”要求，认为仅市场可获得性即足以破坏新颖性。此举消除了长期存在的法律不确定性，显著提高了及时提交专利申请的重要性，任何上市前公开均可能使后续专利无效。
report_items.summary_en: On July 2, 2025, the Enlarged Board of Appeal of the European Patent Office issued decision G 1/23, ruling that products made publicly available before a patent application’s filing date constitute prior art under Article 54(2) EPC. This applies regardless of whether their composition or internal structure can be analyzed or reproduced by a skilled person. The decision overturns the long-standing reproducibility requirement established in G 1/92, establishing that market availability alone is sufficient to destroy novelty. This landmark ruling eliminates significant legal uncertainty regarding...
core_points_zh: 推翻G1/92先例，取消现有技术认定中的“可再现性”硬性门槛
确立市场公开即构成现有技术原则，无论内部结构能否被反向工程
极大扩展现有技术范围，对专利新颖性审查及申请策略产生深远影响
core_points_en: Overturns G 1/92 precedent by removing the strict reproducibility threshold for determining prior art status.
Establishes that market availability constitutes prior art regardless of whether internal structures can be reverse-engineered.
Significantly expands the scope of prior art, profoundly impacting novelty examination and patent application strategies.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕产品上市前的任何公开行为，包括展会展示或销售，因即使技术细节未完全披露，产品本身也可作为现有技术驳回专利。建议建立严格的保密与申请时间管理机制，确保在申请日前不公开核心技术，避免在新规下丧失新颖性。
report_items.insight_en: This decision fundamentally shifts the risk profile for product launches in Europe. Companies must now treat any public availability of a product as potentially fatal to future patent claims, irrespective of whether competitors can technically replicate the invention. Strict confidentiality protocols are essential before any market exposure. Organizations should prioritize securing European patent applications before...
insight_points_zh: 强化申请前保密管理，严防产品上市导致新颖性丧失风险
调整全球布局策略，优先在欧洲完成申请后再进行市场推广
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strengthen pre-filing confidentiality management to prevent novelty loss risks from premature product launches.
Practice note: Adjust global portfolio strategies by prioritizing European patent filings before initiating market promotion or sales.
What to monitor: How national courts and examiners apply this broader prior art definition to complex, non-reproducible technologies.

report_items.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Administrative Committee formally adopted the procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) in April 2026, establishing its legal foundation. Subsequently, on May 12, 2026, PMAC launched its dedicated Case Management System, enabling electronic submission of alternative dispute resolution requests. This development marks a significant step toward full operational readiness for the Centre. PMAC offers mediation, arbitration, and expert determination services covering European patents, Unitary Patents, and Standard Essential Patent disputes. T...
core_points_zh: UPC行政委员会正式批准PMAC程序规则，奠定法律与运营基础
PMAC案件管理系统正式上线，支持电子提交替代性争议解决请求
服务范围涵盖欧洲专利及SEP/FRAND案件，提供多元ADR选项
core_points_en: UPC Administrative Committee approved PMAC procedural rules, establishing the legal and operational framework for its activities.
PMAC Case Management System went live on May 12, supporting electronic submissions for alternative dispute resolution proceedings.
Service scope covers European patents and SEP/FRAND cases, offering diverse ADR options including mediation and arbitration.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧涉及专利纠纷时，可关注UPC-PMAC提供的调解与仲裁渠道。相比传统诉讼，ADR程序更具灵活性与保密性，有助于降低维权成本并加速SEP许可谈判进程。建议企业评估将部分非核心或复杂跨国争议转入PMAC处理，以优化全球知识产权战略布局。
report_items.insight_en: Parties involved in European patent disputes should evaluate the UPC-PMAC as a viable alternative to traditional litigation. The ADR mechanisms offer greater flexibility and confidentiality, which can significantly reduce enforcement costs and accelerate resolution timelines. For Standard Essential Patent licensing negotiations, these channels may facilitate more constructive dialogue and potentially yield favorable...
insight_points_zh: 利用PMAC的ADR机制可降低在欧专利诉讼成本并提升解决效率
针对SEP/FRAND纠纷，可探索通过调解仲裁达成更优许可条件
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Utilizing PMAC ADR mechanisms can lower European patent litigation costs and improve resolution efficiency.
Practice note: For SEP/FRAND disputes, explore mediation and arbitration to achieve optimized licensing conditions.
What to monitor: Track the commencement of mediation services in late May 2026 and subsequent arbitration rollout schedules.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟达成禁令：植物基替代品禁用肉类名称
report_items.title_en: EU Agreement Bans Specific Meat Names for Plant-Based Alternatives to Prevent Consumer Misleading
report_items.title: Ban on the use of meat names for plant-based alternatives
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟机构达成协议，禁止在植物基替代产品上使用特定肉类名称（如鸡肉、牛肉），旨在防止消费者被误导并依据《欧盟商标条例》第7条避免注册误导性商标。通用词汇如“汉堡”仍可使用。该禁令可能导致含肉类名称的植物基品牌无法继续使用现有注册商标，迫使供应商修改包装及品牌策略以符合新规。
report_items.summary_en: The European Parliament, Council, and member states have agreed to prohibit the use of specific meat names on plant-based alternatives. This measure aims to prevent consumer confusion and ensure clarity regarding product nature, aligning with Article 7 of the EU Trademark Regulation (EUTMR), which bars registration of marks likely to mislead the public about quality or origin. While generic terms like 'burger' or 'sausage' remain permissible for describing vegetarian products, specific references to animal parts such as chicken, beef, or bacon are now reserved exclusively for actual meat. Cons...
core_points_zh: 欧盟禁止植物基产品使用特定动物部位名称，以防误导公众
依据EUTMR第7条，误导性商标不得注册，现有品牌可能受限
通用描述词如burger允许使用，但需移除具体肉类指代词汇
core_points_en: Specific animal part names like chicken or beef are banned on plant-based products to prevent misleading consumers about the true nature of the goods.
Article 7 of the EUTMR prohibits registering trademarks that mislead the public, potentially invalidating existing brands using restricted meat terminology.
Generic descriptive terms such as burger remain allowed, but specific meat references must be removed from packaging and marketing materials immediately.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧出口植物基食品的中国企业而言，需立即审查现有商标及包装，移除鸡、牛等具体肉类词汇以避免侵权或违规。建议保留burger等通用词，重新设计品牌标识。同时评估现有注册商标的有效性，必要时进行变更或新申请，确保符合欧盟反误导规定，降低法律风险。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants offering plant-based alternatives in the EU must urgently audit their current trademark portfolios and product packaging. Brands utilizing specific meat-related terms risk non-compliance with the new ban, potentially rendering protected marks unusable for their intended goods. Companies should transition to generic descriptors like 'veggie burger' while evaluating the validity of existing registra...
insight_points_zh: 立即审查在欧植物基产品包装，移除具体肉类名称以合规
评估现有含肉类词商标风险，及时调整品牌策略应对禁令
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Urgent review of EU plant-based product packaging is required to remove specific meat names and ensure regulatory compliance.
Practice note: Assess the viability of existing trademarks containing meat terms and adjust brand strategies to avoid infringement or invalidation.
What to monitor: Ongoing enforcement actions by EU authorities regarding the use of prohibited animal-specific terminology in food marketing.

再看第二条，调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高。值得关注的是，优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险。
再看第三条，申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性。值得关注的是，重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险。
最后看第四条，法院依职权严格审查上诉期限与程序规则，确保法律确定性及非歧视原则。值得关注的是，严守UPC程序期限，规避因技术性违规导致的权利丧失风险。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕商标、专利、SEP标准必要专利展开，接下来值得继续关注继续跟踪官方机构和法院是否发布后续配套动作。

topics.headline_zh: UPC判例深化：侵权认定趋严与程序合规警示
topics.headline_en: UPC Jurisprudence Tightens Infringement Standards and Enforces Strict Procedural Compliance
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，UPC司法实践趋于成熟。杜塞尔多夫等分院强化单一产品侵权比对及功能性限定解释，增加零部件直接侵权风险；上诉庭明确程序期限起算、撤诉规则及费用裁定路径，强调严格合规。同时，调解机制扩展为低成本解纷提供新选项。企业需警惕等同原则累积要件及FRAND谈判前置义务，优化欧洲专利布局与应诉策略，以应对日益精细化的司法审查。
key_points: 侵权判定趋严：强调单一产品特征比对，功能性限定可能使单独销售组件构成直接侵权，等同原则适用标准提高。
程序合规刚性化：上诉期自附理由判决日起算，登录系统不视为应诉；严守时限，善用“可原谅错误”救济。
争议解决多元化：UPC设立调解中心，结合EUIPO机制，鼓励通过ADR降低跨境维权成本与时间风险。
actions: 优化权利要求布局：避免过度使用功能性限定，排查单独出口零部件的侵权风险，完善技术证据链。
建立程序风控机制：实施期限双重核查，谨慎处理官网涉诉声明以防强制公示，区分初审与上诉费用预算。
前置FRAND与调解策略：收到SEP通知立即书面表达许可意愿，在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决争议。
watchlist: 关注主要分部早期判例对法律解释的固化影响，避免单一法庭依赖带来的战略偏差。
监测马耳他等非参与国导致的单一专利效力缺口，动态调整传统验证与单一专利组合策略。
跟踪UPC调解仲裁中心运作实效及EUIPO调解范围扩大后的具体案例指引。

It is written in a neutral client-facing style and should be read alongside the cited source material.

Dispute resolution diversifies through UPC mediation centers and EUIPO mechanisms, providing alternative pathways to reduce cross-border enforcement costs and temporal risks.

Implement dual-verification docketing systems for all procedural deadlines, manage public litigation status disclosures cautiously, and differentiate budget allocations between fir...
Establish immediate written licensing willingness upon receiving SEP notifications to satisfy FRAND prerequisites, incorporate mediation clauses into contracts, and leverage ADR me...

Track territorial gaps in unitary patent coverage caused by non-participating states like Malta, adjusting strategies between traditional national validations and unitary effects.
Evaluate the operational effectiveness of the UPC Mediation and Arbitration Center and review emerging case guidance following the expanded scope of EUIPO mediation services.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP司法与监管双重变局
topics.headline_en: EU SEP Landscape: Judicial Aggression Meets Regulatory Tightening
topics.summary_zh: 2026年欧洲SEP领域呈现司法激进与监管收紧并行的态势。英国法院确立全球FRAND费率裁定权，UPC强化禁令与反禁诉令效力，加剧跨国诉讼博弈。同时，欧盟修订TTBER明确专利池合规指引，UKIPO启动SEP改革以解决许可不透明问题。中企面临高额许可费裁决及NPE利用UPC发起攻势的双重挑战，需警惕反垄断审查风险。
key_points: 英国法院通过三星诉中兴等案确立全球FRAND费率裁定先例，金额高达数亿美元，重塑许可谈判基准。
UPC积极签发反禁诉令(AASI)对抗中国临时许可申请，并鼓励调解，司法管辖权争夺白热化。
欧盟新TTBER生效细化专利池与集体谈判反垄断规则，UKIPO推进SEP改革，合规门槛显著提升。
actions: 立即审查现有SEP许可协议，依据新TTBER评估反垄断合规性，优化专利池参与策略。
在收到侵权通知时迅速书面表达许可意愿并提供担保，避免被认定为非善意实施者而遭禁令。
建立多国平行诉讼应对机制，重点监控英国与UPC的费率裁定动态，提前准备FRAND抗辩证据。
watchlist: UKIPO将于2026年完成的SEP政策细则及其对争议解决机制的具体影响。
英国最高法院在特斯拉等案中关于全球FRAND管辖权的最终裁决走向。
NPE利用UPC平台针对中国科技企业发起新一轮SEP诉讼的趋势与防御策略。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European standard-essential patent environment in 2026 is defined by concurrent judicial assertiveness and regulatory consolidation. UK courts have solidified their authority to determine global FRAND rates, while the Unified Patent Court actively issues anti-anti-suit injunctions, intensifying cross-border litigation dynamics. Simultaneously, the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation clarifies antitrust compliance for patent pools, and the UK Intellectual Property Office advances reforms targeting licensing transparency. These developments create a complex landscape where entities face heightened risks of significant royalty awards and aggressive enforcement by non-practicing entities. Navigating this dual pressure requires rigorous adherence to negotiation protocols and strategic management of parallel proceedings across jurisdictions to mitigate exposure to injunc...
key_points_en: UK courts established precedents for determining global FRAND rates via global cross-licence judgments, significantly influencing international licensing benchmarks and valuation m...
The Unified Patent Court strengthened its procedural toolkit by issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign interim licenses and prioritizing claimant submissions in FRAND d...
Regulatory frameworks tightened with the new Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation refining patent pool rules and UKIPO initiatives addressing systemic licensing opacity.
actions_en: Review existing licensing agreements and internal compliance protocols against the updated Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation to ensure antitrust alignment.
Immediately document willingness to license in writing upon receiving infringement notices to preserve FRAND defenses and avoid findings of unwillingness leading to injunctions.
Develop coordinated strategies for multi-jurisdictional disputes, focusing on preparing robust FRAND evidence for UK and UPC proceedings while monitoring NPE enforcement trends.
watchlist_en: Finalization of UKIPO policy details regarding SEP transparency and dispute resolution mechanisms scheduled for completion in 2026.
Supreme Court determinations on the scope of global FRAND jurisdiction and the enforceability of arbitration-linked licensing offers.
Emerging patterns of non-practicing entity litigation strategies utilizing the Unified Patent Court platform against technology implementers.

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟商标恶意注册激增与融资新政
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Tightens Bad Faith Scrutiny While Launching IP Financing and SME Subsidies
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟知识产权环境呈现严监管与新机遇并存态势。德国等地恶意抢注利用AI技术激增，CJEU裁定异议权利需全程有效，动态商标因功能性被驳回风险加大。同时，EUIPO推出中小企业基金补贴及IP融资新政，旨在降低合规成本并释放创新资本。企业需强化防御体系，善用政策红利。
key_points: 恶意注册与技术性驳回风险上升：德国警示AI辅助恶意抢注，CJEU明确异议期间在先权利须持续有效，纯技术功能动态商标将被驳回。
地理标志保护扩容：利摩日瓷器获欧盟首项手工业GI，出口企业需排查品名侵权风险，关注中国特产申请机遇。
政策红利释放：EUIPO 2026中小企业基金提供费用报销，新报告建议通过IP抵押释放5800亿欧元创新融资，降低市场准入门槛。
actions: 建立动态监控与证据留存机制：针对德国等高风险法域，提前注册并监控异议期权利状态，收集在先使用证据以应对恶意指控。
优化注册策略与合规审查：利用EUIPO基金补贴优先申请欧盟商标，审查动态商标显著性，排查出口产品是否侵犯新增地理标志。
探索IP资产金融化路径：规范知识产权管理流程，评估将商标权作为抵押物获取融资的可行性，拓宽资金渠道。
watchlist: 塞浦路斯等成员国对商标战略资产属性的配套规则动态
欧盟层面关于动态商标功能性判断标准的进一步司法指引
EUIPO IP融资政策在成员国的具体落地执行细则
topics.summary_en: The first half of 2026 presents a dual landscape for intellectual property rights holders in Europe, characterized by heightened regulatory enforcement and new financial incentives. Judicial developments have clarified that earlier rights must remain valid throughout opposition proceedings, while motion marks depicting purely technical functions face increased rejection risks. Concurrently, the expansion of geographical indications for artisanal products introduces new compliance considerations for exporters. To support innovation, the EUIPO has introduced the 2026 SME Fund for fee reimbursements and released policy recommendations aimed at unlocking substantial capital through IP-backed financing. Companies must balance robust defensive strategies against bad faith filings with proactive utilization of these emerging funding mechanisms to optimize asset value and market protection.
key_points_en: Heightened scrutiny on bad faith filings and functional marks: Courts require earlier rights to remain valid during oppositions, and motion marks limited to technical functionality...
Expansion of geographical indications: The registration of Limoges porcelain as the first EU artisanal GI necessitates audits of export product names to mitigate infringement risks...
New financing and subsidy opportunities: The EUIPO SME Fund offers partial fee reimbursement, while new policy frameworks aim to facilitate access to hundreds of billions in innova...
actions_en: Implement dynamic portfolio monitoring: Ensure continuous validity of earlier rights during oppositions and maintain evidence of use to counter bad faith allegations or invalidity...
Optimize registration and compliance strategies: Leverage EUIPO subsidies for cost-effective EU trademark filings, assess distinctiveness for non-functional motion marks, and audit...
Prepare for IP asset monetization: Standardize intellectual property management and valuation processes to evaluate the feasibility of using trademarks and patents as collateral un...
watchlist_en: National implementations of rules recognizing trademarks as strategic investment assets in member states such as Cyprus.
Further judicial guidance from EU courts regarding the distinction between technical functionality and distinctive features in motion mark applications.
Specific execution details and eligibility criteria for EUIPO IP-backed financing policies across different EU member states.

topics.headline_en: UKIPO Warns of Serious Risks from Counterfeit Toner and Ink Cartridges
topics.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局警示假冒碳粉严重损害设备，且造假者常免责不赔。全球假冒贸易额高达4670亿美元，多关联有组织犯罪网络。该趋势凸显供应链合规风险，要求企业强化防伪保护与溯源管理，以应对日益严峻的品牌侵权威胁及潜在的法律连带责任。
key_points: 假冒耗材致损严重且造假者常免责不赔偿
全球假冒贸易达4670亿美元并关联有组织犯罪
出口需建立合规溯源体系防范供应链指控
actions: 建立全流程产品合规溯源体系
加强进口供应商尽职调查避免低价陷阱
升级防伪技术以应对有组织犯罪网络
watchlist: 欧盟及英国对假冒耗材执法力度变化
跨国假冒犯罪网络打击行动进展
品牌方维权诉讼案例与赔偿标准更新
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued a warning regarding the significant harms caused by counterfeit ink and toner cartridges, particularly affecting small businesses. The blog highlights that while often perceived as low-risk, fake print consumables can cause severe operational damage. Global trade in counterfeit goods is estimated at USD 467 billion, frequently linked to serious organized criminal networks. This trend underscores supply chain compliance risks, requiring enterprises to strengthen anti-counterfeiting protections and traceability management. Companies must implement strict procurement systems and compare product features to identify fakes on online platforms. Establishing robust IP compliance frameworks helps prevent involvement in counterfeit supply chains. Conducting thorough supplier due diligence avoids procuring unverified, low-cost consumables. These measu...
key_points_en: Counterfeit print consumables cause serious business damage, yet manufacturers bear no liability or compensation responsibility.
Global counterfeit trade reaches approximately USD 467 billion, frequently linked to serious organized criminal networks.
Businesses must implement strict procurement systems and compare product features to identify fakes on online platforms.
actions_en: Establish strict IP compliance and traceability systems to prevent involvement in counterfeit supply chains.
Conduct thorough supplier due diligence to avoid procuring unverified, low-cost consumables.
Upgrade anti-counterfeiting technologies to combat sophisticated organized criminal networks.
watchlist_en: Changes in enforcement intensity regarding counterfeit consumables in the EU and UK.
Progress in crackdowns against transnational counterfeit criminal networks.
Updates on brand owner litigation cases and compensation standards.
